chain.thought: Explanation: The “back of shirt sponsor” column is blank up to the entry for 2008–. Starting from 2009–2011, there is a back sponsor listed (PSU Technology Group). Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows no back-of-shirt sponsor for all entries up to 2008–. The next entry, 2009–2011, lists a back sponsor (PSU Technology Group), and subsequent periods also have back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.
